message:
feat(extras): backdrop runtime degradation integration (bd-l8x9.2.4)

Automatically degrade decorative backdrops under load by mapping
frame.buffer.degradation -> FxQuality.

Changes:
- Backdrop.quality -> quality_override (optional override for demos)
- set_quality() -> set_quality_override(Option<FxQuality>)
- Backdrop::render() now derives quality from frame degradation
- Area-based clamping applied for large areas

Tests:
- backdrop_uses_degradation_for_quality_full/reduced/off
- backdrop_quality_override_takes_precedence
- backdrop_area_clamping_applied_for_large_areas
- backdrop_degradation_levels_map_correctly

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
